name: shorevest-website
description: Static website for ShoreVest Partners, including English and Chinese pages, the investor portal, insights, media pages, legal notices, brand assets, and PDF publications.

scripts.check:recruitment: node --check assets/js/recruitment-role-list.js && node --check assets/js/recruitment-role-detail.js && node --check assets/js/recruitment-application.js && node --check scripts/validate-recruitment-roles.js && node --check api/recruitment/applicationValidation.js && node --check api/recruitment/fileSignatures.js && node --check api/recruitment/handler.js
scripts.test:recruitment: node tests/recruitment-roles.test.js && node tests/recruitment-role-list.test.js && node tests/recruitment-role-detail.test.js && node tests/recruitment-application.test.js && node tests/recruitment-backend.test.js && node tests/recruitment-static-security.test.js
